items.question: Overview
items.answer: NexGen Healthcare sells sealed at-home blood testing kits that include hygiene-protected sample collection components. This policy explains when orders can be cancelled, when kits can be returned, and how refunds are processed. It does not affect your statutory rights under Irish and EU consumer law.

items.question: Cancelling Before Dispatch
items.answer: You can cancel an order free of charge at any time before it is dispatched by contacting info@nexgenhealthcare.ie with your order number. Kits ordered before the daily cut-off are usually dispatched the same working day, so please contact us as soon as possible. Cancelled orders are refunded in full to the original payment method.

items.question: 14-Day Returns for Unopened Kits
items.answer: Under the EU Consumer Rights Directive you may withdraw from your purchase within 14 days of delivery, provided the kit is unopened with its hygiene seal intact. Contact us for a return authorisation, then post the kit back to us within 14 days of your request. Once we receive and inspect the kit, your refund is issued within 14 days.

items.question: Opened or Used Kits
items.answer: For health and hygiene reasons, kits that have been opened, have a broken hygiene seal, or have had the activation code registered cannot be returned or refunded, in line with the sealed-goods exception in consumer law. Once your sample has been posted to the laboratory, the analysis service has begun and the order is non-refundable.

items.question: Damaged, Faulty or Incorrect Kits
items.answer: If your kit arrives damaged, has missing components, is past its expiry date, or is not the product you ordered, contact us within 30 days with your order number and a photo of the issue. We will send a free replacement kit or issue a full refund, including any delivery charges — whichever you prefer.

items.question: Failed or Insufficient Samples
items.answer: If the laboratory cannot analyse your returned sample (for example, an insufficient volume or a sample damaged in transit), we will send you one free replacement kit so you can try again. Replacement kits are provided instead of a refund, because the laboratory service has already been engaged for the original sample.

items.question: How Refunds Are Processed
items.answer: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-10 working days of approval, depending on your card provider. We will email you confirmation when the refund is processed. Refunds cannot be issued to a different card or account.

items.question: Business Hours
items.answer: Our support team is available Monday to Friday 8:00am–4:00pm and Saturday 8:00am–12:00pm, excluding Sundays and public holidays. Requests received outside business hours are handled from the start of the next working day.

items.question: Contact
items.answer: For all cancellation, return, or refund requests, email info@nexgenhealthcare.ie with your order number, or write to NexGen Healthcare, Ludgate Hub, Old Bakery, Townshend Street, Skibbereen, Co. Cork, P81T324, Ireland.
